heb8c367fga9b6g4737gbb33gd851ec35a499: A fine entrance, your drowship, but we got orders. Lads, intruder!
h0547ad8eg4dbfg48d1gbc94g27668cda7fb2: Hah! Lads, looks like this idiot just went and raised the alarm on theirselves!
h8fa31c72gc83eg40bdg9e43g45a159468297: A lovely rhythm, your lordness. Shame you just raised the alarm.
he0c0e842g03acg434fg89degcbeb0a3c8659: Lovely beat, that - course you warned half the camp there's killin' to be done. Get 'em, lads!
hbe52fe27gccfbg40b2g8840g0e0fd7ab6de5: Eh... beg pardon, True Soul, but that's the alarm. Not to worry, though - I'll handle the lads.
hd10d3df0ga0d8g41cfg94f0g49b793753bbb: Heh. No harm gettin' the buggers off their arses, eh?
h560b47e0g5399g40c8g9a8ag3b9dceec13e0: Ah, nice one, True Soul. Keepin' the lads on their toes.
h6a61ff32g86a3g4b32g9ea7gf20cfb771397: Can't have 'em fallin' asleep now, can we?
ha25cfa7fg6e78g4366g9317g0a6bc849ef67: Eh... drum's still workin' all right, True Soul.
hd938fc18g3569g411bg990bg94f65de638da: Reckon the lads'll stay put this time.
hc93a6404g54beg4f41g8fbcg17ccf0368b00: That's lovely stuff, True Soul. Only... we smack that drum so the lads know there's killin' on.
h4b021614gd710g43beg82cbg01e1b1528cfd: Not to worry! I'll set 'em straight. Bit of music never hurt anyone, eh?
hc7939b2fgf81fg4dcfgb2cdg2ed15a5c6c0d: Still got it, True Soul! Must be all that practice you're doin', heh.
h574a03a9gbc4bg4495gbdd2gd9b8bbc33b05: Oh look - backup's on its way. Again.
h893ea39ag74b9g4a35gb760gc3d3198ffaa5: Lovely beat, that, True Soul. Just lovely.
h2f9ee740g0985g426dga03dgd2d5176fa567: Reckon the lads'll stay put this time.
h3bde0a65ga2d0g4b14ga5d0gebdb86e3333f: Sorry for this, but I tried warnin' you.
h155c9960geb34g4163ga8bfg20852d75cf7d: Ah, your excelness, you weren't supposed to touch that.
hf473bb75gd674g4a35g9645gee1af48b6bcc: Sorry 'bout this, but rules is rules.
h4cd87f5dg0405g48edgad8eg3f1d48cbc2ba: Careful, your lordness. That drum's for callin' backup.
hb1a6bc1dg9e84g4f7bg94f0g5ed138dca334: I'll calm 'em down, seein' as it was a lovely rhythm. But, erh, don't do it again.
hc01e1298g63c6g4b4fgaf59gda8f023f979f: Oi! Can't say you weren't warned, mate.
h5963754cg937ag4b1egb7b3g9c9c9e0da458: I let you in and you raise the alarm anyway? Hurts my feelings, that does.
h6c4d95d6g78fcg412ag8a7fg789c815282d8: Backup's comin'. Reckon I'll tell 'em you were an intruder after all.
h70c78cedg5c67g4894g9e20g350eab453e3f: Lovely rhythm, that. Pity the drum's for callin' in backup.
hf590fbd5g1863g4d92gbfb7g38c7abd131a8: Don't worry - seein' how you made us dance, I won't let 'em kill ya - this time.
